body:
## Rationale

**Format proven:** drummerComparisons.js has 41 confirmed pairs covering major matchups. This is batch 19 with three genuinely distinct pairings across prog, extreme, and modern-tech subgenres.

**Pairs:**
1. **gavin-harrison-vs-danny-carey** — The two dominant prog-metal/art-rock drummers of their generation. Both in DB (soundLike + kit articles). Gavin = Porcupine Tree, King Crimson; Danny = Tool. High TAM: "best progressive metal drummer" LLM target. NOT in DB or any proposal.
2. **inferno-vs-flo-mounier** — The extreme metal blast-beat kings. Both have strong GSC CTR signal (Inferno 11% on "inferno drum kit", Flo 50% on Flo queries). Extreme/death/black comparison with broad AI Overview potential. NOT in DB or any proposal.
3. **mike-mangini-vs-matt-garstka** — Modern technical/progressive comparison. Both post-2010 tech drummers with unique approaches. Addresses emerging prog-tech audience. NOT in DB or any proposal.

**Not in DB:** None of these 3 pairs appear in `drummerComparisons.js` (41 pairs confirmed).

**Not in any open proposal:** Confirmed via GitHub search — zero results.

---

## Implementation

### File to edit
`packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js`

### Entries to add
```js
{
  slug: 'gavin-harrison-vs-danny-carey',
  drummer1: 'gavin-harrison',
  drummer2: 'danny-carey',
  title: 'Gavin Harrison vs Danny Carey: Progressive Metal Drumming Compared',
  description: 'A deep comparison of Gavin Harrison (Porcupine Tree / King Crimson) and Danny Carey (Tool) — two of progressive metal\'s most cerebral drummers.',
  faqs: [
    { q: 'Who is more technical: Gavin Harrison or Danny Carey?', a: 'Both are elite technicians. Harrison excels in polyrhythmic layering and linear drumming; Carey dominates in polyrhythmic groove and improvisation at extreme tempos.' },
    { q: 'What kits do Gavin Harrison and Danny Carey play?', a: 'Harrison plays a Pearl Reference kit with Paiste cymbals; Carey is known for his massive Drum Workshop kit with Paiste and Zildjian cymbals and octobans.' },
    { q: 'Which drummer has a more complex style?', a: 'Carey\'s odd-time compositions (Tool\'s Lateralus at 987 beats) are considered among the most complex ever recorded; Harrison\'s polyrhythmic precision in Porcupine Tree has equally staggered musicologists.' }
  ]
},
{
  slug: 'inferno-vs-flo-mounier',
  drummer1: 'inferno',
  drummer2: 'flo-mounier',
  title: 'Inferno vs Flo Mounier: Extreme Metal Blast Beat Masters',
  description: 'Comparing Inferno (Behemoth) and Flo Mounier (Cryptopsy) — the two most technically demanding extreme metal drummers of their generation.',
  faqs: [
    { q: 'Who is faster: Inferno or Flo Mounier?', a: 'Both push the limits of human drumming. Flo set records with None So Vile blast tempos; Inferno\'s endurance across brutal live sets is legendary.' },
    { q: 'What kits do Inferno and Flo Mounier use?', a: 'Inferno plays a Pearl Reference Pure kit with Paiste cymbals; Flo uses a Tama Starclassic kit with Sabian cymbals.' },
    { q: 'Which drummer has more technical diversity?', a: 'Flo Mounier has more jazz and groove crossover; Inferno excels in controlled brutality and live consistency across extreme tempos.' }
  ]
},
{
  slug: 'mike-mangini-vs-matt-garstka',
  drummer1: 'mike-mangini',
  drummer2: 'matt-garstka',
  title: 'Mike Mangini vs Matt Garstka: Modern Technical Prog Drumming',
  description: 'Dream Theater\'s Mike Mangini vs Animals as Leaders\' Matt Garstka — comparing the two most technically acclaimed progressive metal drummers of the 2010s.',
  faqs: [
    { q: 'What is the difference between Mike Mangini and Matt Garstka\'s styles?', a: 'Mangini specializes in speed records and complex metric modulation within a band context; Garstka focuses on extended technique and ghost-note density in a groove-centric framework.' },
    { q: 'What drum kits do Mangini and Garstka use?', a: 'Mangini uses a Pearl Masters MCX kit with Zildjian cymbals; Garstka plays a Pearl Reference kit with Sabian cymbals and electronic pads.' },
    { q: 'Who has won more speed drumming records?', a: 'Mike Mangini holds several Guinness World Records for drumming speed; Garstka\'s records are in the creative application of technique rather than raw speed.' }
  ]
}
```

### LLM files to create (3 files)
- `packages/frontend/llms/vs/gavin-harrison-vs-danny-carey.md`
- `packages/frontend/llms/vs/inferno-vs-flo-mounier.md`
- `packages/frontend/llms/vs/mike-mangini-vs-matt-garstka.md`

Follow the existing comparison LLM file format (see `llms/vs/` for template).

### Schema per comparison page
- **FAQPage** schema: https://schema.org/FAQPage
- Two **Person** schemas (one per drummer): https://schema.org/Person

---

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per comparison page
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs per page
- ≥4 internal links per page (both drummer profiles, their key album articles)
- FAQPage + 2× Person JSON-LD present
- 3 LLM companion files created

## Verify
1. All 3 slugs appear in sitemap.xml
2. Pages render at `/drummers/compare/[slug]` (follow existing comparison route pattern)
3. FAQPage schema valid
4. Both drummer profiles link to the comparison page
5. LLM files at `llms/vs/gavin-harrison-vs-danny-carey.md`, etc.

## Done
Add 3 entries to `drummerComparisons.js`, create 3 LLM companion files, confirm pages live.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison pairs batch 19 — gavin-harrison-vs-danny-carey + inferno-vs-flo-mounier + mike-mangini-vs-matt-garstka (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
